# CWE-335 vulnerable — Incorrect Usage of Seeds in PRNG
lang: go
file: CWE-335-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"math/rand"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
	"time"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func AssignSeatLottery(c *GinCtx) string {
	seed := time.Now().Unix()
	rand.Seed(seed)
	ticket := strconv.Itoa(rand.Intn(50))
	return ticket
}
